problem id: d5c5d624
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(6)

examples:
  11101011 -> 01011111
  00111101 -> 11101001
  10100101 -> 00101111
  01100011 -> 00011011
  11001101 -> 01101111
  00000001 -> 00001000
  00110110 -> 10110001
  11110011 -> 10011111
  10010100 -> 10100110
  01110010 -> 10010011

query: 00001010
predicted answer: 01010000
